meta.title: Seth Cropsey on Iran's threat to close off the Strait of Hormuz for CTV
meta.description: Hudson Senior Fellow Seth Cropsey joined CTV to discuss Iran's threat to close off the Strait of Hormuz on January 5, 2012.
